sourcePrompt: An F-4 Phantom II fighter-bomber, about nineteen meters long, parked on tricycle gear with its nose high. A long pointed radome leads to a tandem two-seat canopy; broad low-set wings sweep back with their outer tips angled sharply upward, while the tailplanes angle just as sharply down - the Phantom's unmistakable cranked silhouette. Twin engine exhausts open under the tail, and underwing pylons carry bombs and missiles. Navy gray over white, muscular and angular.
